title: Smoking cessation

assessment.text: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.
assessment.rationale: Supports tobacco-cessation identity and matching terminology in a UAE healthcare-provider documentation context.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.

source.title: Practical Guideline for Management of Tobacco Dependence

exact_section.heading: Who Can Use this Guide and Basic and Essential Facts

referral.text: Supports clinician-documented counselling, support, pharmacotherapy discussion, referral, and arranged follow-up without mapping medicine names or doses.
referral.rationale: Supports clinician-documented counselling, quit-plan discussion, cessation-support referral, and arranged follow-up without medicine names or doses.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented counselling, support, pharmacotherapy discussion, referral, and arranged follow-up without mapping medicine names or doses.

follow_up.text: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.
follow_up.rationale: Supports current tobacco status, smoking rate, readiness, prior attempts, motivation, triggers or barriers, and reviewed-history fields.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.

source_limitations: Chest pain, breathlessness, wheeze, weight loss, physical examination, fixed one-to-three-month timing, and broad duration presets remain unsupported.
The workflow must not add medicine names, doses, a quit date, referral, or follow-up that the clinician did not document.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
